evidence.summary: Bulk CSV/JSON snapshot index (no API key required)

finding: Companies House officer-data product reachable. LinkedIn data would require Sales Navigator subscription or scraping — neither is open public data.
method: Existence: Companies House director appointment/resignation data is in the bulk product (the leg actually fetched); LinkedIn career history is not open public data; ONS workforce ageing is open but referenced as context only — not fetched.
notes: Per-firm director-age inference is feasible via Companies House live API (date of birth on appointments); requires API key.
